purpose: First real factory pass after the initial four packaged review videos.
promotion_rule: Do not promote until capture session, detector agreement, kinematic scorecard, visual review, engine replay, installed-app review, and durable artifact storage all pass.

targets.reason: Bodyweight hold movement; good first validation target for contact stability and loop-free posture.
Equipment path and arm identity need explicit source evidence before guide-ready claims.
Single-leg/hip motion needs clean side-view capture and phase checks before app motion.
